meta.title: How to lo-fi with A.I.
meta.description:
Feeling frazzled?
Time to hit the brakes, kick back, and let the soothing, Zen-like melodies spun by our friendly neighborhood artificial intelligence wash over you. Get ready for tranquility on tap!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
__________________________________________________
Colab Notebook text 2 MIDI:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/lo-fi-i-beats-87437767

Prompt:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/prompt-for-lo-i-87437661
__________________________________________________
tools used in the video:
GPT playground:
https://platform.openai.com/playground
Claude2:
https://www.anthropic.com/index/claude-2
Meta's llama2:
https://labs.perplexity.ai/
Steam isolator:
https://moises.ai/
A.I. videos:
Pika Labs.
https://www.pika.art/
__________________________________________________
00:00 Intro
02:09 Lo-fi & relax music history
04: 33 Making relaxing music with A.I.
05:30 making music with Llama2
08:28 making music with Claude2 & Google musicLM
11:47 GPT4 playground
15:29 outro
